goal: Remove AI slop from every source file

tasks.description: Clean src/engine.ts — remove all narrating comments like '// Build column list for better-sqlite3', '// Key columns become hidden parameters', '// Filter out key columns...', '// Always add connection as a parameter', '// Map parameter values to key column quals', '// Connection parameter is last', '// Resolve connection', '// Check cache', '// Rate limit', '// Decide get vs list', '// Use get only when ALL key columns have quals', '// Hydrate if needed', '// Cache results', '// Release rate limiter', '// Yield rows, picking only declared columns', '// Configure rate limits', '// Register all tables from all plugins'. Keep the code exactly the same, just strip these comments.

check.command: npx tsx -e "import { QueryEngine } from './src/engine.js'; console.log('ok')" && ! grep -n '// Build column\|// Key columns become\|// Filter out key\|// Always add connection\|// Map parameter\|// Connection parameter\|// Resolve connection\|// Check cache\|// Rate limit\|// Decide get\|// Use get only\|// Hydrate if\|// Cache results\|// Release rate\|// Yield rows\|// Configure rate\|// Register all' src/engine.ts

tasks.description: Clean src/index.ts — remove all section header comments: '// ── SDK entrypoint ──', '// Import dripline as a library:', '//   import { Dripline } from "dripline";', '// Core engine', '// Plugin SDK — everything needed to write a plugin', '// Plugin API (for writing plugins)', '// Plugin installer', '// Config', '// Cache & Rate Limiter', '// Formatters', '// HTTP utilities for plugin authors', '// Built-in plugins'. Just keep the exports, no comments.

check.command: npx tsx -e "import { Dripline } from './src/index.js'; console.log('ok')" && ! grep '// ' src/index.ts

tasks.description: Clean src/commands/repl.ts — remove comments: '// Show key columns that aren't in columns list (parameters)', '// Access cache through engine — we'll need to expose it', '// Load history', '// Meta-commands', '// Save to history'.

check.command: ! grep -n '// Show key\|// Access cache\|// Load history\|// Meta-commands\|// Save to history' src/commands/repl.ts

tasks.description: Clean src/plugin/installer.ts — remove comments: '// npm:@scope/pkg@version or npm:pkg', '// Handle @scope/pkg@version', '// Scoped: @scope/pkg@version', '// git:github.com/user/repo@ref or https://...', '// Normalize to https URL', '// Local path', '// Register in plugins.json', '// Remove files for npm/git installs'.

check.command: npx tsx -e "import { parsePluginSource } from './src/plugin/installer.js'; console.log('ok')" && ! grep '// npm:\|// Handle @scope\|// Scoped:\|// git:github\|// Normalize to\|// Local path\|// Register in\|// Remove files' src/plugin/installer.ts

tasks.description: Clean src/plugin/loader.ts — remove comments: '// skip invalid plugins', '// skip invalid', '// Check for index.ts/index.js', '// Check for package.json with dripline.plugins', '// skip', '// skip malformed', '// 1. Built-in plugins', '// 2. Project-local: .dripline/plugins/', '// Also load from plugins.json', '// 3. Global: ~/.dripline/plugins/'.

check.command: ! grep -n '// skip\|// Check for\|// 1\. Built\|// 2\. Project\|// Also load\|// 3\. Global' src/plugin/loader.ts

tasks.description: Clean src/plugin/api.ts — remove JSDoc comments '/** Check if a value is a PluginFunction (vs a static PluginDef) */' and '/** Resolve a plugin export (function or static) to a PluginDef */'.

Clean src/plugins/utils/http.ts — remove comments: '// Response has: headers

body
status_code', '// Parse response headers', '// Last line is status code', '// Parse Link header for next page'.

check.command: ! grep '// Response has\|// Parse response\|// Last line\|// Parse Link' src/plugins/utils/http.ts

tasks.description: Clean src/rate-limiter.ts — remove comments: '// Busy-wait for sync context (virtual table generators are sync)', '// spin', '// busy wait'.

check.command: ! grep '// Busy-wait\|// spin\|// busy wait' src/rate-limiter.ts

tasks.description: Clean src/sdk.ts — remove the large JSDoc block (/** ... Dripline SDK — query cloud APIs using SQL ... @example ... */), remove inline comments: '// Re-create engine to pick up the new plugin's tables', '// cache is enabled if it exists'. Keep the short /** method docs */ on public methods.

check.command: ! grep 'Re-create engine\|cache is enabled if\|query cloud APIs using SQL' src/sdk.ts

tasks.description: Clean src/utils/table-formatter.ts — remove comments: '// Calculate column widths', '// Cap widths to fit terminal', '// │ between each + edges', '// 1 space each side', '// Top border', '// Header', '// Header separator', '// Data rows', '// Bottom border'.

check.command: ! grep '// Calculate column\|// Cap widths\|// │ between\|// 1 space\|// Top border\|// Header$\|// Header sep\|// Data rows\|// Bottom border' src/utils/table-formatter.ts

tasks.description: Clean src/utils/exit-codes.ts — remove inline comments '// Invalid input, missing args' and '// Data directory not found'.
Clean src/main.ts — remove comment '// Default to REPL when no command given'.

Clean README.md — remove 'A lightweight Steampipe alternative built on SQLite virtual tables. No PostgreSQL, no FDW, no heavyweight dependencies', remove 'Plugins use a function-based API inspired by pi\'s extensions:', remove the entire '## vs Steampipe' comparison table section. Keep the rest.
Final pass — run all tests to make sure nothing broke.
